objective: Understand that fractions are equal parts of a whole
fun_hook: Imagine sharing a pizza with 4 friends. Each person gets 1/4.
practice_question: If you eat 2 out of 8 slices, what fraction did you eat?
transfer_task: You have 3 cookies and want to share them equally with 2 friends. How much does each person get?
fun_twist: Turn this into a short rap about sharing pizza fairly
effectiveness_notes: Good for visual learners, needs clearer transfer task
